'''Vun Merett Jai''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senatorial]] [[Aide/Legends|aide]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Vun Merett Jai was one of the hostages that were captured by [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]].
